tasks.label: Start Streamlit app
tasks.command: cd prototype && if pgrep -f '[s]treamlit run app.py' > /dev/null 2>&1; then echo 'Streamlit is already running from a previous session. Skipping start to avoid a port 8501 collision. Use Ctrl+C in the other Task terminal if you want to restart it.'; else if command -v uv >/dev/null 2>&1; then uv run streamlit run app.py; else streamlit run app.py; fi; fi
